title: handle_inbox() in server.rs is ~300 lines with multiple concerns; should be decomposed
description: server::handle_inbox() is approximately 380 lines long and handles rate limiting, signature parsing, signature verification with cache invalidation, digest verification, date freshness check, and then dispatches to Follow/Accept/Undo/default cases. Each of those concerns could be a separate function. As written, the function is difficult to test in isolation (no sub-functions to unit test), and the sequential fallthrough structure means a reader must hold the entire flow in their head to understand what happens for a Follow. This is a maintainability concern: bugs introduced in one section affect the shared precondition setup for all activity types.
close_reason: Accepted: noted decomposition opportunity, not refactoring in this pass.
